things.name: Mt Hagen Cultural Show
things.description: Annual tribal gathering with thousands of warriors in traditional bilas dress from the highlands

things.name: Tari Highlands Huli Wigmen
things.description: Huli wigmen in wigs of their own hair decorated with birds of paradise feathers

things.name: Birds of Paradise Watching
things.description: Princess Stephanie's, King of Saxony and Ribbon-tailed Astrapia in the Highland forests

things.name: Wahgi Valley Coffee Plantations
things.description: Highlands coffee growing region producing some of the world's finest Arabica coffee

things.name: Minj Markets
things.description: Traditional highland market with sweet potatoes, pig exchanges and bilum string bags

things.name: Baiyer River Wildlife Sanctuary
things.description: Birds of paradise, tree kangaroos and cassowaries in a highland valley

things.name: Traditional Sing-Sing Performance
things.description: Witness authentic tribal sing-sing dance ceremonies with body paint and feather headdresses

things.name: Mt Wilhelm Trek
things.description: Papua New Guinea's highest peak at 4,509m accessible from the Highlands

things.name: Kuk Early Agricultural Site
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage where agriculture was independently invented 10,000 years ago

things.name: Mumu Earth Oven Feast
things.description: Traditional feast cooked in a stone oven pit - pork, kaukau and greens wrapped in leaves
